action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 finished training ESM2-35M fine-tuned with region pooling for 5 epochs, val Spearman improved to 0.8857 (from 0.78 frozen). Training took 3000s (~50 min). No test eval yet for this model. Analysis: Val performance is on low-mutation set; test set (>2 mutations) likely still lower. Need test spearman to quantify generalization gap and decide next steps (more epochs, different architecture, etc.). Decision: Submit eval immediately with best checkpoint to measure test Spearman, then plan improvements based on test performance vs val gap.
